question: Q3
claim: What-speaks-old-contract: 5+ readers rely on stale edges being physically gone (causal-boost.ts:706-708; graph-search-fn.ts:272,515,520; bfs-traversal.ts:248-253; recovery-payload.ts:273; stage2-fusion.ts:466) - so 'promoter closes instead of deletes' would regress them; skip-closed is the safe shape.
